_comment: Tier 6.4 bundle size budget — headroom sized ~5-10% over the accepted baseline. Update intentionally; regression = commit refused.

_baseline_2026_04_19_phase_1_8_3._note: Phase 1.8.3.1-3 added three Intelligence-floor cards (RecommendationImpact, ChurnForecast, RiskForecast) with inline SVG chart primitives. Total chunks grew +143 KB over the 2026-04-15 baseline; budget raised from 1600000 to 1700000 to keep ~5% headroom without blocking the next Phase 1.8.3 cards.

_baseline_2026_04_20_lite_cassettoni._note: LiteCassettoniGrid (2x3 cassettoni + expandable panel + inline Donut SVG + 6 getDonutSegments + 6 getWhatToDo data-driven + 5 data-hook refactors). Adds ~96 KB total over the Phase 1.8.3 baseline. Budget raised 1700000 -> 1800000 for ~5% headroom through upcoming Lite polish + reopening Pro-floor work.

_baseline_2026_04_20_lite_v4_drawer_rich._note: Lite panel v4 — ports AbandonedIntent's DetailDrawer storytelling (mechanics+stakes / hero-stat + key-metrics + methodology / primary-action + supporting-actions) INLINE for all 6 features. Removes the <ExpandedContent> deep-card embed (was redundant). Net: LiteCassettoniGrid grew from ~40 KB to ~45 KB (6×5 new config fields, 2 new JSX sections, methodology block, primary/supporting action renderers); largest-chunk crossed 720 KB by ~5 KB. Bump largest_chunk_bytes 720000 -> 740000 for ~2% headroom. chunks_total and count unchanged direction.

_baseline_2026_04_20_lite_rars_hero._note: LiteRarsHero — permanent Revenue-at-Risk hero above the cassettoni grid + Gap A/B/C ecosystem (deep links + EmptyPreview + controlled expand state). RARS is HedgeSpark's one true differentiator (no competitor computes deterministic right-now loss in store currency); lifting it to permanent top-slot + 3 ranked components with direct drill-down is the positioning change the founder authorized 2026-04-20. New file ~400 LOC, cold-start preview mirrors cassettone EmptyPreview pattern for consistency. Net largest-chunk +19 KB (725→744); bump 740000 -> 760000 for ~2% headroom heading into competitive-polish iteration.

_baseline_2026_04_20_strada_3_completist._note: Strada 3 completista sprint — three new Lite surfaces: VerticalBenchmarksCard (3.1, reused, tier-unlock), ChannelAttributionCard (3.2, new ~440 LOC), MonthlyCohortsCard (3.3, new ~270 LOC). Plus 3.3 adds MonthlyCohortsResponse typings to api-types.ts. Largest chunk grew 744→767 KB (+23 KB) — two new standalone components do most of the weight. chunks_total 1720→1762 KB (+42). Budget raised 760000 -> 820000 for ~7% headroom through Strada 3.4 (CSV export) + 3.5 (Slack).

_baseline_2026_04_21_lite_v5_spark_daily._note: Lite v5 'Spark Daily' — new LiteSparkDaily component (~700 LOC, 6 zones, inline Week Ridge SVG) + sparkVoice.ts helper. Total chunks grew 1762→1812 KB (+50). Still feature-flag gated (NEXT_PUBLIC_LITE_SPARK_DAILY) — zero prod impact until flag flips. Budget raised 1800000 -> 1900000 for ~5% headroom through v5 drawer + email retrofit follow-ups.

_baseline_2026_04_21_lite_v5_deeper_draw._note: Lite v5 Deeper drawer — LiteDeeperDrawer.tsx (~400 LOC) with 4-tab container (Peers/P&L/Attribution/Retention) that imports 9 existing Lite surfaces. These imports already existed in v4 primary-stream graph; v5 flag-on route moves them into the drawer. Turbopack places the drawer + its tab children in the /app shared chunk, pushing largest-chunk 767→825 KB (+58). Still feature-flag gated — zero prod impact until NEXT_PUBLIC_LITE_SPARK_DAILY flips. Budget raised 820000 -> 860000 for ~4% headroom.

_baseline_2026_04_21_settings_migration_._note: Settings migration Phase 1+2 complete — 7 sub-pages under /app/settings (costs, cost-defaults, currency, slack, klaviyo, privacy, webhooks, team). Each new page ships its own route chunk; chunks_count rose 35→41 (+6) as Next.js code-splits by route. Inline SettingsSection (~560 LOC) deleted from /app page.tsx so largest_chunk actually SHRUNK 825→750 KB (-75 KB) and chunks_total fell 1889→1817 KB (-72 KB). Net: dashboard is smaller per-route, just more routes. Budget chunks_count raised 40 -> 48 for ~15% headroom for future sub-pages.

_baseline_2026_04_28_gap1_reports_builde._note: Gap #1 Custom Report Builder shipped (Lite full parity per `feedback_0_60_parity_doctrine.md`). New routes: /app/reports (Hub), /app/reports/new (Wizard), /app/reports/[id] (Viewer), /app/reports/[id]/edit (Edit). Plus shared ReportBuilderForm.tsx (~340 LOC) used by both wizard + edit. Hub also adds the /app/settings/surveys editable form (Gap #7 sister-bug closure: tier-agnostic Settings chrome). Total chunks grew 1817→1975 KB (+158 KB) for 4 new pages + the shared form + post-purchase survey card. largest_chunk 750→827 KB (+77). chunks_count 41→46 (+5 routes). Budget chunks_total raised 1950000 -> 2050000 for ~4% headroom heading into Gap #4 (Inventory) + Gap #5 (Multi-store).
